history.content:
<thought>
I am at (02, B) facing right. In front of me at (02, C) is lava (L), so I cannot move forward. My goal is at (08, H). To reach it safely, I should go down along column B, which has floor cells all the way to row 08, then move right to column H. First, I need to face down. Since I am facing right, turning clockwise (TURN_RIGHT) will make me face down.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am now at (02, B) facing down. The cell below me at (03, B) is a safe floor (.). Moving down will bring me closer to my goal at (08, H). I will proceed forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at (03, B) facing down. The cell below at (04, B) is floor, which is safe. Moving forward continues my path down column B.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at (04, B) facing down. Below me is (05, B) which is floor. Continuing down column B is safe, and I need to reach row 08 to go right towards the goal. I'll move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at (05, B) facing down. The cell below me is (06, B), which is floor. Moving forward is safe and continues my descent down column B.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at (06, B) facing down. The cell below is (07, B), which is floor (.). Moving forward is safe and continues down the clear column B toward row 08, from which I can turn right to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at (07, B) facing down. The cell below is (08, B), which is floor and safe. Moving forward will bring me to row 08, where I can then turn right and proceed east to the goal at (08, H).
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at (08, B) facing down. To reach the goal at (08, H), I need to move east (right) along row 08. Turning left from down will orient me to the right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at (08, B) facing right. The cell ahead (08, C) is floor. The goal is further east. I'll move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at (08, C) facing right. The next cell (08, D) is floor. I'll continue moving toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at (08, D) facing right. The next cell (08, E) is floor. Moving forward continues my path toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at (08, E) facing right. The next cell (08, F) is floor. Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal at (08, H).
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at (08, F) facing right. The next cell (08, G) is floor. Moving forward takes me closer to the goal at (08, H).
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at (08, G) facing right. The next cell (08, H) is the goal. Moving forward reaches the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
